Class SLTypeResolver

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.SLExpressionResolver
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.translation.SLTypeResolver
public final class SLTypeResolver extends SLExpressionResolver
Resolves types occurring explicitly in specification expressions (e.g. as part of a static method call MyClass.m()).

    • doResolving

      protected SLExpression doResolving(SLExpression receiver, String name, SLParameters parameters) throws SLTranslationException
      Description copied from class: SLExpressionResolver
      Resolves property calls on explicit receivers.
      Specified by:
      doResolving in class SLExpressionResolver
      Parameters:
      receiver - receiver (may *not* be null)
      name - name of the property
      parameters - the actual parameters, or null if not applicable
      Returns:
      a suitable term or collection if successful, null otherwise
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException
